raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "darker box (left box)",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The right arm can reach the right side face of the darker box without colliding with the lighter box (adjacent on the right) or the cup (in front of the lighter box). There is enough lateral clearance to apply gentle counterforce without shifting the box.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is laterally constrained and stabilized against unintended sliding/rotation during the lift."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "darker box (left box)",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both arms have clear access to the left and right side faces of the darker box. The grasp approach does not require entering the narrow gap between the two boxes; the right arm uses the exposed right face while avoiding contact with the lighter box and keeping vertical clearance above the tabletop.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is securely held by both end-effectors, lifted off the table, and separated from contact with the tabletop and nearby objects."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The right arm can reach the right side face of the darker box without colliding with the lighter box (adjacent on the right) or the cup (in front of the lighter box). There is enough lateral clearance to apply gentle counterforce without shifting the box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is laterally constrained and stabilized against unintended sliding/rotation during the lift.

parsed_json.Precondition: Both arms have clear access to the left and right side faces of the darker box. The grasp approach does not require entering the narrow gap between the two boxes; the right arm uses the exposed right face while avoiding contact with the lighter box and keeping vertical clearance above the tabletop.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is securely held by both end-effectors, lifted off the table, and separated from contact with the tabletop and nearby objects.
